experimental.title: Rotation-flip detector (Improving/Leading -> Weakening/Peaking) as a state-transition timing layer
experimental.note: Method: flag any sector crossing out of a strong quad (Leading->Peaking / Improving->Weakening) with negative acceleration on a fresh bar, then event-study forward 5/10-day sector return conditioned on whether the next scheduled catalyst confirms or denies the roll. THIS RUN the detector flags an XLI->XLE hand-off: XLI Weakening (quad W, accel -1.36, rsMom6m +1.64, rsMom 99.46) rolling out while XLE Improves (quad I, accel +2.26, rsMom 102.48, rsMom6m +14.21) rotates in, with leader XLK only Lagging (quad A, accel -0.54, rsMom1m -7.04) and no clean Leading GICS sector - a cyclical-to-cyclical (industrials->energy) hand-off, not yet a persistent leadership change (XLE MA stack still tangled, +11.4% >200d), so it is actionable as a tilt but flagged for persistence per anti-whipsaw. The value is the state-transition TIMING, which no owning tool persists today. Inputs: per-sector rsRatio/rsMom/accel/quad history across distinct market-bar dates + each sector's next dated catalyst + realized forward return.

experimental.title: Cross-tool haven-abstinence x sector-rotation risk-on gate (non-firing this run - logged as a negative observation)
experimental.note: Method: on each fresh bar, cross the real-assets monetary-haven leg against the sector-RRG rotation vector - declare a 'clean risk-on' state only when (a) BOTH monetary havens are in downtrends AND (b) a defensive sector is rotating out while a cyclical rotates in with no clean Leading defensive; then event-study forward bench drift conditioned on the joint state vs either half alone. THIS RUN the state does NOT fire: the haven leg is satisfied - GLD 9.4 and SLV 0 both Downtrend (mom63 -17.14 / -29.86), IBIT 24.3 and BTC-USD 37.5 both Downtrend, no haven bid - but the sector roll is cyclical-to-cyclical (XLI industrials rotating OUT -> XLE energy rotating IN), so leg (b)'s defensive-out condition is unmet; XLV is not in the fresh into/out/leader triplet. Honestly a negative observation, useful only to distinguish a broad defensive-to-cyclical risk-on turn from an intra-cyclical reshuffle. Inputs: real-assets GLD/SLV/IBIT/BTC-USD trend+mom63, sector per-name rrgState/rotation/accel with GICS defensive/cyclical tag, bench MA-stack; needs a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates.
